channel.title: Open Meadow Games — Development Log
channel.description: Behind the scenes at Open Meadow Games. Game design decisions, art updates, and stories from the development of Park & Hide.

item.title: Making the Ocean Move
item.description: The Coastal Cliffs finally have living water: drifting caustics, shoreline foam, sun sparkles, and a depth gradient that hugs the coast. Here's how I built animated ocean water on a Godot tilemap without ever distorting a single pixel.

item.title: Ricardo's Shelter Has a Home
item.description: Ricardo and his dog shelter are now wired into the Rest Stop, plus a tileset refresh swaps the old numbered pack for proper Beach and Large Cliff/Sand/Dirt/Grass sets.

item.title: Pixel Art & NPC Animation Milestone
item.description: New tilesets, environment concepts, and a deep dive into the stealth camping system at the heart of Park & Hide.

item.title: Open Meadow Games is Official
item.description: Open Meadow Games is officially registered in British Columbia. Studio website is live, social media is set up, and Park & Hide is in active development.

item.title: Stealth Camping Loop Prototype Complete
item.description: A full prototype of Park & Hide's core loop is done: site selection, gear loadout, stealth rolls, and the dawn resolution.
